feat.name: Wrapped in Smoke
feat.text: You ignite a small portion of powder in a rapid, inefficient burn, creating a hazy cloud. You create a cloud of smoke in a 5-foot emanation centered on your innovation, which lasts for 1 minute. All creatures and objects within the smoke become concealed, and those outside the smoke become concealed to those within.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
